article_title: Burnaby Council — 8.1. Attachment 2 - Burnaby Anti-Racism Framework 2026-01-27.pdf

briefs.title: Council to Consider: Burnaby Anti-Racism Framework with Four Key Action Areas
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to consider a proposed Anti-Racism Framework that would guide city-wide efforts to fight racism through leadership, staff training, community inclusion, and public reporting systems. The framework outlines both actions already underway and future steps that would need Council approval and resources.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the Council decision — this framework could shape city programs and services that affect your business and staff.
